title: Single cell RNA-seq of primary human glioblastomas
author: Patel AP Tirosh I Trombetta JJ Shalek AK Gillespie SM Wakimoto H Cahill DP Nahed BV Curry WT Martuza RL Louis DN Rozenblatt-Rosen O Suvà ML Regev A Bernstein BE
content: S-ECPF-GEOD-57872 Single cell RNA-seq of primary human glioblastomas We report transcriptomes from 430 single glioblastoma cells isolated from 5 individual tumors and 102 single cells from gliomasphere cells lines generated using SMART-seq. In addition, we report population RNA-seq from the five
